TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Bunun, story: bnNr-frog_Hanaivaz
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: mihumisang.
S.PHON: mix~χumisaŋ.
S.FORM: mihumisang.
S.PHON: mix~χumisaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 你好.
Nice to see you.

S.FORM: ah muhnang saikin napali'uni ah 'itu mailantangus lahaiban tu palihabasan.
S.PHON: ax~χ mux~χnaŋ saikin napal~ɬiʔuni ax~χ ʔitu mail~ɬantaŋus l~ɬax~χaiban tu pal~ɬix~χabasan.
S.FORM: ah muhnang saikin napali'uni ah 'itu mailantangus lahaiban tu palihabasan.
S.PHON: ax~χ mux~χnaŋ saikin napal~ɬiʔuni ax~χ ʔitu mail~ɬantaŋus l~ɬax~χaiban tu pal~ɬix~χabasan.
S.TRANSL: 我要再一次講關於祖先的傳說故事
I am going to talk about the legends of the ancestors again.

S.FORM: aiza tu tas tu hanian aiza tacini maza uvaaz saipuk saia mas asu.
S.PHON: aiða tu tas tu x~χanian aiða taʨini maða uvaað saipuk saia mas asu.
S.FORM: aiza tu tas tu hanian aiza tacini maza uvaaz saipuk saia mas asu.
S.PHON: aiða tu tas tu x~χanian aiða taʨini maða uvaað saipuk saia mas asu.
S.TRANSL: 有一天有一個小孩,他養了狗.
One day, there is a child. He kept a dog.

S.FORM: at madamu saia mas tauk tasa tu sisiuh pungadahun saicia 'isaicia tu pan.
S.PHON: at madamu saia mas tauk tasa tu ɕiɕiux~χ puŋadax~χun saiʨia ʔisaiʨia tu pan.
S.FORM: at madamu saia mas tauk tasa tu sisiuh pungadahun saicia 'isaicia tu pan.
S.PHON: at madamu saia mas tauk tasa tu ɕiɕiux~χ puŋadax~χun saiʨia ʔisaiʨia tu pan.
S.TRANSL: 然後呢,他抓起一隻青蛙放進他的瓶子裡.
Then he caught a frog and put it into a bottle.

S.FORM: manaskal saia kaupahanian mashailang mas 'isaicia tu sisiuh tu dinamu 'ingadah sia pancia.
S.PHON: manaskal~ɬ saia kaupax~χanian masx~χail~ɬaŋ mas ʔisaiʨia tu ɕiɕiux~χ tu dinamu ʔiŋadax~χ ɕia panʨia.
S.FORM: manaskal saia kaupahanian mashailang mas 'isaicia tu sisiuh tu dinamu 'ingadah sia pancia.
S.PHON: manaskal~ɬ saia kaupax~χanian masx~χail~ɬaŋ mas ʔisaiʨia tu ɕiɕiux~χ tu dinamu ʔiŋadax~χ ɕia panʨia.
S.TRANSL: 他每天很快樂地玩賞那隻他抓來放在瓶子裡的青蛙.
He was always happy, playing with the frog he caught in the bottle.

S.FORM: aiza tu tas tu labian masabah saia.
S.PHON: aiða tu tas tu l~ɬabian masabax~χ saia.
S.FORM: aiza tu tas tu labian masabah saia.
S.PHON: aiða tu tas tu l~ɬabian masabax~χ saia.
S.TRANSL: 有一晚他要睡覺.
One night he was going to sleep.

S.FORM: miliskin saia tu laangati pingadahun saicia 'isaicia sisiuh sia pan.
S.PHON: mil~ɬiskin saia tu l~ɬaaŋati piŋadax~χun saiʨia ʔisaiʨia ɕiɕiux~χ ɕia pan.
S.FORM: miliskin saia tu laangati pingadahun saicia 'isaicia sisiuh sia pan.
S.PHON: mil~ɬiskin saia tu l~ɬaaŋati piŋadax~χun saiʨia ʔisaiʨia ɕiɕiux~χ ɕia pan.
S.TRANSL: 他心想反正他已經把青蛙放在瓶子裡面了.
He thought since he had put the frog into the bottle,

S.FORM: at kaupahanian ashailangun at.
S.PHON: at kaupax~χanian asx~χail~ɬaŋun at.
S.FORM: at kaupahanian ashailangun at.
S.PHON: at kaupax~χanian asx~χail~ɬaŋun at.
S.TRANSL: 然後每天玩賞那隻青蛙.
He would enjoyed the frog every day.

S.FORM: masabah saia hai izaun saicia 'isaicia asua.
S.PHON: masabax~χ saia x~χai iðaun saiʨia ʔisaiʨia asua.
S.FORM: masabah saia hai izaun saicia 'isaicia asua.
S.PHON: masabax~χ saia x~χai iðaun saiʨia ʔisaiʨia asua.
S.TRANSL: 然後他睡覺時會抱著他的狗.
Then he slept with his dog held in his arms.

S.FORM: mapasabah 'amin sia 'isaicia tu sapalan.
S.PHON: mapasabax~χ ʔamin ɕia ʔisaiʨia tu sapal~ɬan.
S.FORM: mapasabah 'amin sia 'isaicia tu sapalan.
S.PHON: mapasabax~χ ʔamin ɕia ʔisaiʨia tu sapal~ɬan.
S.TRANSL: 他也讓牠睡在他的床上.
He also let [his dog] to sleep in the bed.

S.FORM: undusaan naia daza sapalan at.
S.PHON: undusaan naia daða sapal~ɬan at.
S.FORM: undusaan naia daza sapalan at.
S.PHON: undusaan naia daða sapal~ɬan at.
S.TRANSL: 兩個一起在床上.
These two were on the bed together.

S.FORM: miliskin uvaaza tu maza sisiuh hai pingadahun sia pan.
S.PHON: mil~ɬiskin uvaaða tu maða ɕiɕiux~χ x~χai piŋadax~χun ɕia pan.
S.FORM: miliskin uvaaza tu maza sisiuh hai pingadahun sia pan.
S.PHON: mil~ɬiskin uvaaða tu maða ɕiɕiux~χ x~χai piŋadax~χun ɕia pan.
S.TRANSL: 小孩子認為那個青蛙已經放在瓶子裡面.
The kid thought that the frog was put into the bottle.

S.FORM: at masabah naia.
S.PHON: at masabax~χ naia.
S.FORM: at masabah naia.
S.PHON: at masabax~χ naia.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們睡著了.
Then they fell asleep.

S.FORM: cinkailasin uvaaza hai macinsuu saia sadu mas isaicia tu pan ingadah sia aih sisiuh tu ingadahcia.
S.PHON: ʨinkail~ɬaɕin uvaaða x~χai maʨinsuu saia sadu mas isaiʨia tu pan iŋadax~χ ɕia aix~χ ɕiɕiux~χ tu iŋadax~χʨia.
S.FORM: cinkailasin uvaaza hai macinsuu saia sadu mas isaicia tu pan ingadah sia aih sisiuh tu ingadahcia.
S.PHON: ʨinkail~ɬaɕin uvaaða x~χai maʨinsuu saia sadu mas isaiʨia tu pan iŋadax~χ ɕia aix~χ ɕiɕiux~χ tu iŋadax~χʨia.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩突然醒來,立刻往他的瓶子裡看青蛙是否在裡面.
All of a sudden the kid woke up, and immediately he checked if the frog is in the bottle.

S.FORM: cinhuza saia tu aiuh aitu is'uka inaaka dinamu a sisiuha.
S.PHON: ʨinx~χuða saia tu aiux~χ aitu isʔuka inaaka dinamu a ɕiɕiux~χa.
S.FORM: cinhuza saia tu aiuh aitu is'uka inaaka dinamu a sisiuha.
S.PHON: ʨinx~χuða saia tu aiux~χ aitu isʔuka inaaka dinamu a ɕiɕiux~χa.
S.TRANSL: 他嚇了一跳,為什麼我所抓的青蛙不見了?
He was shocked, "Why did the frog I caught disappear?"

S.FORM: mindangkaz amin a asua sadu ai tuza tu uka.
S.PHON: mindaŋkað amin a asua sadu ai tuða tu uka.
S.FORM: mindangkaz amin a asua sadu ai tuza tu uka.
S.PHON: mindaŋkað amin a asua sadu ai tuða tu uka.

TRANSL.notes: 連狗也站起來看,(心想)「哎呀,真的不見了.」

S.TRANSL: 連狗也站起來看, 「哎呀,真的不見了.」
The dog also stood up and looked. 'Alas, it truly disappeared.'

S.FORM: macinsuu saia kunastu kikilim isaicia tu sinaipuk tu sisiuh ngadah pan.
S.PHON: maʨinsuu saia kunastu kikil~ɬim isaiʨia tu ɕinaipuk tu ɕiɕiux~χ ŋadax~χ pan.
S.FORM: macinsuu saia kunastu kikilim isaicia tu sinaipuk tu sisiuh ngadah pan.
S.PHON: maʨinsuu saia kunastu kikil~ɬim isaiʨia tu ɕinaipuk tu ɕiɕiux~χ ŋadax~χ pan.
S.TRANSL: 他馬上下床找他養在瓶子裡的青蛙.
He got out of bed right away and looked for the frog he fostered in the bottle.

S.FORM: sisuhazun saicia amin isaicia sapila kucua.
S.PHON: ɕisux~χaðun saiʨia amin isaiʨia sapil~ɬa kuʨua.
S.FORM: sisuhazun saicia amin isaicia sapila kucua.
S.PHON: ɕisux~χaðun saiʨia amin isaiʨia sapil~ɬa kuʨua.
S.TRANSL: 他也把他的拖鞋、鞋子翻遍了.
He also sifted through his slippers and shoes.

S.FORM: tu ka kungadahcia maza sisiuha.
S.PHON: tu ka kuŋadax~χʨia maða ɕiɕiux~χa.
S.FORM: tu ka kungadahcia maza sisiuha.
S.PHON: tu ka kuŋadax~χʨia maða ɕiɕiux~χa.
S.TRANSL: 會不會青蛙就進到那裡面呢?
Maybe the frog just went inside the shoes?

S.FORM: ai uka.
S.PHON: ai uka.
S.FORM: ai uka.
S.PHON: ai uka.
S.TRANSL: 唉,沒有
Alas, no.

S.FORM: at maza asu hai mindangaz amin kikilim hai.
S.PHON: at maða asu x~χai mindaŋað amin kikil~ɬim x~χai.
S.FORM: at maza asu hai mindangaz amin kikilim hai.
S.PHON: at maða asu x~χai mindaŋað amin kikil~ɬim x~χai.

TRANSL.notes: 然後那隻狗也起來幫忙找(青蛙).

S.TRANSL: 然後那隻狗也起來幫忙找 .
Then that dog also helped to look for the frog.

S.FORM: nii tu haiap tu kap pungadahun a isaicia bungua sia pan maza itu asua kungadah sia pancia sasaak kikilim tu isa maza sisiuha hai.
S.PHON: nii tu x~χaiap tu kap puŋadax~χun a isaiʨia buŋua ɕia pan maða itu asua kuŋadax~χ ɕia panʨia sasaak kikil~ɬim tu isa maða ɕiɕiux~χa x~χai.
S.FORM: nii tu haiap tu kap pungadahun a isaicia bungua sia pan maza itu asua kungadah sia pancia sasaak kikilim tu isa maza sisiuha hai.
S.PHON: nii tu x~χaiap tu kap puŋadax~χun a isaiʨia buŋua ɕia pan maða itu asua kuŋadax~χ ɕia panʨia sasaak kikil~ɬim tu isa maða ɕiɕiux~χa x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 狗不知不覺把牠的頭塞進瓶子裡,還一直聞,想找出青蛙到底在哪裡.
The dog got its head stuck in the bottle, smelling around and looking for where the frog was.

S.FORM: ais ka niiin mahtu siumanun a maza sia bungua.
S.PHON: ais ka niiin max~χtu ɕiumanun a maða ɕia buŋua.
S.FORM: ais ka niiin mahtu siumanun a maza sia bungua.
S.PHON: ais ka niiin max~χtu ɕiumanun a maða ɕia buŋua.
S.TRANSL: 糟糕!瓶子沒辦法從頭上拿掉了.
Crap! The bottle cannot be removed from the dog's head.

S.FORM: ka kungadah sia pan.
S.PHON: ka kuŋadax~χ ɕia pan.
S.FORM: ka kungadah sia pan.
S.PHON: ka kuŋadax~χ ɕia pan.

TRANSL.notes: (那隻狗的頭)就進到瓶子裡了.

S.TRANSL: 就進到瓶子裡了.
The dog got its head stuck inside the bottle.

S.FORM: itu asu bungu hai kungadah pancia hai niiin mahtu umanun.
S.PHON: itu asu buŋu x~χai kuŋadax~χ panʨia x~χai niiin max~χtu umanun.
S.FORM: itu asu bungu hai kungadah pancia hai niiin mahtu umanun.
S.PHON: itu asu buŋu x~χai kuŋadax~χ panʨia x~χai niiin max~χtu umanun.
S.TRANSL: 狗的頭進到瓶子裡面後,拔不出來了.
The dog put its head inside the bottle and could not get it out.

S.FORM: aiu cinhuza amin a uvaaza tupa tu ais namikua maupacin.
S.PHON: aiu ʨinx~χuða amin a uvaaða tupa tu ais namikua maupaʨin.
S.FORM: aiu cinhuza amin a uvaaza tupa tu ais namikua maupacin.
S.PHON: aiu ʨinx~χuða amin a uvaaða tupa tu ais namikua maupaʨin.
S.TRANSL: 唉唷,小孩也嚇到,說:「啊呀,這樣要怎麼辦?」
The kid was also shocked and said "What am I going to do?"

S.FORM: at miliskin uvaaza tu nii tu mahtu umanun maza sia pana asia itu asucia tu bungucia tu hudhudcia.
S.PHON: at mil~ɬiskin uvaaða tu nii tu max~χtu umanun maða ɕia pana aɕia itu asuʨia tu buŋuʨia tu x~χudx~χudʨia.
S.FORM: at miliskin uvaaza tu nii tu mahtu umanun maza sia pana asia itu asucia tu bungucia tu hudhudcia.
S.PHON: at mil~ɬiskin uvaaða tu nii tu max~χtu umanun maða ɕia pana aɕia itu asuʨia tu buŋuʨia tu x~χudx~χudʨia.
S.TRANSL: 然後,那個孩子覺得拿不掉那個卡在狗的脖子上的瓶子.
Then the kid thought it is impossible to remove the bottle stuck to the dog's neck.

S.FORM: cinliskin saia tu na halhalunku maza asuan.
S.PHON: ʨinl~ɬiskin saia tu na x~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬunku maða asuan.
S.FORM: cinliskin saia tu na halhalunku maza asuan.
S.PHON: ʨinl~ɬiskin saia tu na x~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬunku maða asuan.
S.TRANSL: 他想他要讓狗掉下去.
He thought he was going to drop the dog.

S.FORM: halhalun at mais muhalhal a saicia asua hai napanpulpul a pana.
S.PHON: x~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬun at mais mux~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬ a saiʨia asua x~χai napanpul~ɬpul~ɬ a pana.
S.FORM: halhalun at mais muhalhal a saicia asua hai napanpulpul a pana.
S.PHON: x~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬun at mais mux~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬ a saiʨia asua x~χai napanpul~ɬpul~ɬ a pana.
S.TRANSL: 讓牠掉落,然後,狗掉下去的話,瓶子就會破碎了.
Drop it. Then, once the dog drops, the bottle is going to be broken.

S.FORM: aii tuza tu.
S.PHON: aii tuða tu.
S.FORM: aii tuza tu.
S.PHON: aii tuða tu.
S.TRANSL: 欸,真的!
Wow! Really!

S.FORM: maupacia saia mahal pakasainun siul.
S.PHON: maupaʨia saia max~χal~ɬ pakasainun ɕiul~ɬ.
S.FORM: maupacia saia mahal pakasainun siul.
S.PHON: maupaʨia saia max~χal~ɬ pakasainun ɕiul~ɬ.
S.TRANSL: 他就這樣從窗戶把他丟下去.
He dropped the dog from the window like that.

W.TRANSL: 使役-沿著-處格.近距-受焦

S.FORM: mahalhal hai tuza tu panbulbul a pan hai munapavin itu asucia bungua.
S.PHON: max~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬ x~χai tuða tu panbul~ɬbul~ɬ a pan x~χai munapavin itu asuʨia buŋua.
S.FORM: mahalhal hai tuza tu panbulbul a pan hai munapavin itu asucia bungua.
S.PHON: max~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬ x~χai tuða tu panbul~ɬbul~ɬ a pan x~χai munapavin itu asuʨia buŋua.
S.TRANSL: 丟下去之後,果然瓶子就破了,那個狗的頭出現了!
After dropping it, the bottle really broke, and the dog's head got out.

W.TRANSL: 主焦-前進-外面=改變狀態

S.FORM: manaskal adii uvaaza silibaun saicia adii asua.
S.PHON: manaskal~ɬ adii uvaaða ɕil~ɬibaun saiʨia adii asua.
S.FORM: manaskal adii uvaaza silibaun saicia adii asua.
S.PHON: manaskal~ɬ adii uvaaða ɕil~ɬibaun saiʨia adii asua.
S.TRANSL: 那個孩子很高興,把那隻狗抱起來.
That kid was happy and he hugged the dog.

S.FORM: aii tuza tu uninang muumanin a pan.
S.PHON: aii tuða tu uninaŋ muumanin a pan.
S.FORM: aii tuza tu uninang muumanin a pan.
S.PHON: aii tuða tu uninaŋ muumanin a pan.
S.TRANSL: 真是謝天謝地,瓶子掉下來了!
Thank God the bottle was removed! Really!

S.FORM: ung at istus'ain hai mudaan naia kusia ludun.
S.PHON: uŋ at istusʔain x~χai mudaan naia kuɕia l~ɬudun.
S.FORM: ung at istus'ain hai mudaan naia kusia ludun.
S.PHON: uŋ at istusʔain x~χai mudaan naia kuɕia l~ɬudun.
S.TRANSL: 然後天亮了,他們去山上.
Then the dawn breaks. They go to the mountains.

S.FORM: kikilim malala'la mas isaicia tu sisiuhcia.
S.PHON: kikil~ɬim mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa mas isaiʨia tu ɕiɕiux~χʨia.
S.FORM: kikilim malala'la mas isaicia tu sisiuhcia.
S.PHON: kikil~ɬim mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa mas isaiʨia tu ɕiɕiux~χʨia.
S.TRANSL: 他邊喊邊找他的青蛙.
He yells and looks for his frog.

S.FORM: kikilim tu isa kasu sisiuh.
S.PHON: kikil~ɬim tu isa kasu ɕiɕiux~χ.
S.FORM: kikilim tu isa kasu sisiuh.
S.PHON: kikil~ɬim tu isa kasu ɕiɕiux~χ.
S.TRANSL: 「青蛙,你在哪裡?」
"where are you, frog?"

S.FORM: via tu macisbai via tu macisbai.
S.PHON: via tu maʨisbai via tu maʨisbai.
S.FORM: via tu macisbai via tu macisbai.
S.PHON: via tu maʨisbai via tu maʨisbai.
S.TRANSL: 「為什麼跑掉,為什麼要跑掉?」
"Why did you run away, why did you run away?"

S.FORM: amin a asu hai luluang amin kikilim tu ah isa kasu sisiuh.
S.PHON: amin a asu x~χai l~ɬul~ɬuaŋ amin kikil~ɬim tu ax~χ isa kasu ɕiɕiux~χ.
S.FORM: amin a asu hai luluang amin kikilim tu ah isa kasu sisiuh.
S.PHON: amin a asu x~χai l~ɬul~ɬuaŋ amin kikil~ɬim tu ax~χ isa kasu ɕiɕiux~χ.
S.TRANSL: 連那隻狗也是一直汪汪叫著跟著找說:「青蛙你在哪裡?」
The dog is also looking for the frog, barking "Where are you, frog?"

S.FORM: masa isia naia ludun tanngadah lukis malala'la kikilim hai aiza maza sadu naia mas aiza tasa itu bahusaza lumah mazmuav tu madaing malkazingking sia lukis.
S.PHON: masa iɕia naia l~ɬudun tanŋadax~χ l~ɬukis mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa kikil~ɬim x~χai aiða maða sadu naia mas aiða tasa itu bax~χusaða l~ɬumax~χ maðmuav tu madaiŋ mal~ɬkaðiŋkiŋ ɕia l~ɬukis.
S.FORM: masa isia naia ludun tanngadah lukis malala'la kikilim hai aiza maza sadu naia mas aiza tasa itu bahusaza lumah mazmuav tu madaing malkazingking sia lukis.
S.PHON: masa iɕia naia l~ɬudun tanŋadax~χ l~ɬukis mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa kikil~ɬim x~χai aiða maða sadu naia mas aiða tasa itu bax~χusaða l~ɬumax~χ maðmuav tu madaiŋ mal~ɬkaðiŋkiŋ ɕia l~ɬukis.
S.TRANSL: 當他們在山頂的樹下,一直喊叫尋找的時候,他們看到有一個非常大的虎頭蜂窩掛在樹上.
When they are under the tree in the mountain, yelling and looking for the frog, they see a super big hornet hive hanging from the tree.

S.FORM: at aupa cisuni mas malala'la naia.
S.PHON: at aupa ʨisuni mas mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa naia.
S.FORM: at aupa cisuni mas malala'la naia.
S.PHON: at aupa ʨisuni mas mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa naia.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們一直叫.
Then, they keep yelling.

S.FORM: at maza asua hai sadu tu aiza maza malkazingking a ah bahusaza hai.
S.PHON: at maða asua x~χai sadu tu aiða maða mal~ɬkaðiŋkiŋ a ax~χ bax~χusaða x~χai.
S.FORM: at maza asua hai sadu tu aiza maza malkazingking a ah bahusaza hai.
S.PHON: at maða asua x~χai sadu tu aiða maða mal~ɬkaðiŋkiŋ a ax~χ bax~χusaða x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 然後,狗看到一個掛著的虎頭蜂窩.
Then, the dog sees a suspended hornet hive.

S.FORM: miliskin asua tu natunkaudukaudu sia lukiscia kudadaza mavuvuhvuh mas adiia itu bahusaza lumaha.
S.PHON: mil~ɬiskin asua tu natunkaudukaudu ɕia l~ɬukisʨia kudadaða mavuvux~χvux~χ mas adiia itu bax~χusaða l~ɬumax~χa.
S.FORM: miliskin asua tu natunkaudukaudu sia lukiscia kudadaza mavuvuhvuh mas adiia itu bahusaza lumaha.
S.PHON: mil~ɬiskin asua tu natunkaudukaudu ɕia l~ɬukisʨia kudadaða mavuvux~χvux~χ mas adiia itu bax~χusaða l~ɬumax~χa.
S.TRANSL: 狗就想起要攀爬到樹上去,一直搖晃樹上的虎頭蜂窩.
The dog thinks about climbing up to the tree, and keeps shaking the hornet hive.

W.TRANSL: 可見.遠距-那裡=遠距.主格

S.FORM: tu ingadahcia izaunmu maza inam sinaipuk a sisiuh.
S.PHON: tu iŋadax~χʨia iðaunmu maða inam ɕinaipuk a ɕiɕiux~χ.
S.FORM: tu ingadahcia izaunmu maza inam sinaipuk a sisiuh.
S.PHON: tu iŋadax~χʨia iðaunmu maða inam ɕinaipuk a ɕiɕiux~χ.
S.TRANSL: 牠想知道青蛙是不是在裡面,想著「是不是你們抓走了我們的青蛙?」
It wonders if the frog is in it, thinks "Did you take our frog away?"

S.FORM: at maza uvaaza hai sadu mas ingadah sia dalah tu laak.
S.PHON: at maða uvaaða x~χai sadu mas iŋadax~χ ɕia dal~ɬax~χ tu l~ɬaak.
S.FORM: at maza uvaaza hai sadu mas ingadah sia dalah tu laak.
S.PHON: at maða uvaaða x~χai sadu mas iŋadax~χ ɕia dal~ɬax~χ tu l~ɬaak.
S.TRANSL: 然後,那孩子看地上的洞裡面.
Then the kid looks inside the hole on the ground.

S.FORM: malala'la saia sia laakcia tu ingadahcia sisiuh sima kamu ingadahcia antabanunmu inaak sisiuh.
S.PHON: mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa saia ɕia l~ɬaakʨia tu iŋadax~χʨia ɕiɕiux~χ ɕima kamu iŋadax~χʨia antabanunmu inaak ɕiɕiux~χ.
S.FORM: malala'la saia sia laakcia tu ingadahcia sisiuh sima kamu ingadahcia antabanunmu inaak sisiuh.
S.PHON: mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa saia ɕia l~ɬaakʨia tu iŋadax~χʨia ɕiɕiux~χ ɕima kamu iŋadax~χʨia antabanunmu inaak ɕiɕiux~χ.
S.TRANSL: 他對著那個洞一直叫:「青蛙,你是否在裡面?你們誰在裡面啊,你們是否偷走了我的青蛙?」
He keeps yelling toward the hole "Frog, are you in there? Who are you in there? Did you steal my frog?"

S.FORM: tinhuza adii uvaaza tu aiu.
S.PHON: tinx~χuða adii uvaaða tu aiu.
S.FORM: tinhuza adii uvaaza tu aiu.
S.PHON: tinx~χuða adii uvaaða tu aiu.
S.TRANSL: 那個孩子嚇到「哎唷!」
That kid is shocked. "Oops!"

S.FORM: mun'apav sia laak hai aiza tauk tasa aluaz.
S.PHON: munʔapav ɕia l~ɬaak x~χai aiða tauk tasa al~ɬuað.
S.FORM: mun'apav sia laak hai aiza tauk tasa aluaz.
S.PHON: munʔapav ɕia l~ɬaak x~χai aiða tauk tasa al~ɬuað.
S.TRANSL: 有一隻老鼠從洞裡出現.
A rat comes out from the cave.

S.FORM: mun'apav a aluaz tu mabis matahusngi malala'laang.
S.PHON: munʔapav a al~ɬuað tu mabis matax~χusŋi mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬaaŋ.
S.FORM: mun'apav a aluaz tu mabis matahusngi malala'laang.
S.PHON: munʔapav a al~ɬuað tu mabis matax~χusŋi mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬaaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 老鼠跑出來說:「是什麼怎麼吵啊?還一直在叫!」
The rat goes out and says "What is so noisy and keeps on yelling!"

S.FORM: cinhuza amin a uvaaza.
S.PHON: ʨinx~χuða amin a uvaaða.
S.FORM: cinhuza amin a uvaaza.
S.PHON: ʨinx~χuða amin a uvaaða.
S.TRANSL: 連小孩也嚇到了.
The kid is startled too.

S.FORM: at maza asua hai kudadaza saia.
S.PHON: at maða asua x~χai kudadaða saia.
S.FORM: at maza asua hai kudadaza saia.
S.PHON: at maða asua x~χai kudadaða saia.
S.TRANSL: 然後,那隻狗他爬上去.
Then that dog goes up.

S.FORM: vuvuhvuhun saicia maza lukisa.
S.PHON: vuvux~χvux~χun saiʨia maða l~ɬukisa.
S.FORM: vuvuhvuhun saicia maza lukisa.
S.PHON: vuvux~χvux~χun saiʨia maða l~ɬukisa.
S.TRANSL: 牠一直搖晃那棟樹.
It keeps shaking the tree.

S.FORM: aiza malkazingking a maza sia ah bahusaza lumaha hai.
S.PHON: aiða mal~ɬkaðiŋkiŋ a maða ɕia ax~χ bax~χusaða l~ɬumax~χa x~χai.
S.FORM: aiza malkazingking a maza sia ah bahusaza lumaha hai.
S.PHON: aiða mal~ɬkaðiŋkiŋ a maða ɕia ax~χ bax~χusaða l~ɬumax~χa x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 有一個掛在上面的虎頭蜂窩.
There is a hornet hive hanging.

S.FORM: nii tu haiap tu ka muhalhal a maza bahusaz a.
S.PHON: nii tu x~χaiap tu ka mux~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬ a maða bax~χusað a.
S.FORM: nii tu haiap tu ka muhalhal a maza bahusaz a.
S.PHON: nii tu x~χaiap tu ka mux~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬ a maða bax~χusað a.

TRANSL.notes: 不知不覺,那個虎頭蜂(窩)就掉下來.

S.TRANSL: 不知不覺,那個虎頭蜂 就掉下來.
The hive falls down.

S.FORM: aiu ka supahdaingaz a maza bahusaza ka masan viung viung mun'apav ka masinap naicia tu nakalat.
S.PHON: aiu ka supax~χdaiŋað a maða bax~χusaða ka masan viuŋ viuŋ munʔapav ka maɕinap naiʨia tu nakal~ɬat.
S.FORM: aiu ka supahdaingaz a maza bahusaza ka masan viung viung mun'apav ka masinap naicia tu nakalat.
S.PHON: aiu ka supax~χdaiŋað a maða bax~χusaða ka masan viuŋ viuŋ munʔapav ka maɕinap naiʨia tu nakal~ɬat.
S.TRANSL: 哎唷,好多的虎頭蜂全部一起嗡嗡地出現,追咬著他們.
Oops! So many hornets, all of them buzz and show up, chasing after them, biting them.

S.FORM: at maza uvaaza hai tungnangadah sia tungnadaza sia lukis.
S.PHON: at maða uvaaða x~χai tuŋnaŋadax~χ ɕia tuŋnadaða ɕia l~ɬukis.
S.FORM: at maza uvaaza hai tungnangadah sia tungnadaza sia lukis.
S.PHON: at maða uvaaða x~χai tuŋnaŋadax~χ ɕia tuŋnadaða ɕia l~ɬukis.
S.TRANSL: 然後那個孩子躲到裡面,躲到樹上.
Then that kid hides in, on the tree.

S.FORM: aiza isia lukis tu panga tungnadaza saia mikui na sinapun mas bahusazcia hai.
S.PHON: aiða iɕia l~ɬukis tu paŋa tuŋnadaða saia mikui na ɕinapun mas bax~χusaðʨia x~χai.
S.FORM: aiza isia lukis tu panga tungnadaza saia mikui na sinapun mas bahusazcia hai.
S.PHON: aiða iɕia l~ɬukis tu paŋa tuŋnadaða saia mikui na ɕinapun mas bax~χusaðʨia x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 他躲到樹枝上,萬一被虎頭蜂追他要怎麼辦.
He hides on the branches. What should he do if being chased by hornets.

S.FORM: at maza asua hai tunghabin macisbai.
S.PHON: at maða asua x~χai tuŋx~χabin maʨisbai.
S.FORM: at maza asua hai tunghabin macisbai.
S.PHON: at maða asua x~χai tuŋx~χabin maʨisbai.
S.TRANSL: 然後那個狗,躲起來,逃跑了.
Then that dog hides away, runs away.

S.FORM: mikui macimananu macisbai a maza asu hai sinapun mas bahusazcia.
S.PHON: mikui maʨimananu maʨisbai a maða asu x~χai ɕinapun mas bax~χusaðʨia.
S.FORM: mikui macimananu macisbai a maza asu hai sinapun mas bahusazcia.
S.PHON: mikui maʨimananu maʨisbai a maða asu x~χai ɕinapun mas bax~χusaðʨia.
S.TRANSL: 雖然那個狗用盡全力地跑了,還是被虎頭蜂追趕.
Although the dog runs away with all-out effort, it is chased by the hornets.

S.FORM: at maza uvaaza masa tungnangadazadau sia aih lukis tu siahi at aiza laak ingadah.
S.PHON: at maða uvaaða masa tuŋnaŋadaðadau ɕia aix~χ l~ɬukis tu ɕiax~χi at aiða l~ɬaak iŋadax~χ.
S.FORM: at maza uvaaza masa tungnangadazadau sia aih lukis tu siahi at aiza laak ingadah.
S.PHON: at maða uvaaða masa tuŋnaŋadaðadau ɕia aix~χ l~ɬukis tu ɕiax~χi at aiða l~ɬaak iŋadax~χ.

TRANSL.notes: 然後說是當那個小孩子躲在樹上時,(他發現)樹枝有洞.

S.TRANSL: 然後說是當那個小孩子躲在樹上時, 樹枝有洞.
Then when the kid hides on the tree, it turns out there is a hole there.

W.TRANSL: 躲藏-到-裡面-上面=知識詞

S.FORM: ais kat nii tu haiap tu ka aiza isia laakcia maza kukuavdaingaz.
S.PHON: ais kat nii tu x~χaiap tu ka aiða iɕia l~ɬaakʨia maða kukuavdaiŋað.
S.FORM: ais kat nii tu haiap tu ka aiza isia laakcia maza kukuavdaingaz.
S.PHON: ais kat nii tu x~χaiap tu ka aiða iɕia l~ɬaakʨia maða kukuavdaiŋað.
S.TRANSL: 原來樹洞裡面有隻大老鷹.
Oops! There turns out to be a huge eagle there.

S.FORM: mun'apav amin a kukuav sadu mas uvaazcia tu namadamu mas uvaazcia hai.
S.PHON: munʔapav amin a kukuav sadu mas uvaaðʨia tu namadamu mas uvaaðʨia x~χai.
S.FORM: mun'apav amin a kukuav sadu mas uvaazcia tu namadamu mas uvaazcia hai.
S.PHON: munʔapav amin a kukuav sadu mas uvaaðʨia tu namadamu mas uvaaðʨia x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 老鷹也突然出現,看到那個小孩,要抓那個小孩.
An eagle all of a sudden shows up, that sees the kid and wants to catch him.

S.FORM: cinhuza uvaaza muhalhal lananastu sia lukiscia tu takliscia.
S.PHON: ʨinx~χuða uvaaða mux~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬ l~ɬananastu ɕia l~ɬukisʨia tu takl~ɬisʨia.
S.FORM: cinhuza uvaaza muhalhal lananastu sia lukiscia tu takliscia.
S.PHON: ʨinx~χuða uvaaða mux~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬ l~ɬananastu ɕia l~ɬukisʨia tu takl~ɬisʨia.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩嚇得摔下來了,掉到地上的樹根.
The kid is shocked, dropping onto the root of the tree.

S.FORM: at tunghabin a uvaaza tu aiu namikuabin natauhtauhun mas adii tu kukuavcia.
S.PHON: at tuŋx~χabin a uvaaða tu aiu namikuabin nataux~χtaux~χun mas adii tu kukuavʨia.
S.FORM: at tunghabin a uvaaza tu aiu namikuabin natauhtauhun mas adii tu kukuavcia.
S.PHON: at tuŋx~χabin a uvaaða tu aiu namikuabin nataux~χtaux~χun mas adii tu kukuavʨia.

TRANSL.notes: 然後,那孩子躲起來,(心想:)「哎唷!要怎麼辦呢?我要被那隻老鷹啄了!」

S.TRANSL: 然後,那孩子躲起來, 「哎唷!要怎麼辦呢?我要被那隻老鷹啄了!」

TRANSL.notes: Then the kid hides (and thinks about) "What on earth should I do? I am going to be pecked by the eagle"

S.TRANSL: Then the kid hides "What on earth should I do? I am going to be pecked by the eagle"

S.FORM: madamu saia bungu mapaia tu aiu namikua natauhtauhun na bungua.
S.PHON: madamu saia buŋu mapaia tu aiu namikua nataux~χtaux~χun na buŋua.
S.FORM: madamu saia bungu mapaia tu aiu namikua natauhtauhun na bungua.
S.PHON: madamu saia buŋu mapaia tu aiu namikua nataux~χtaux~χun na buŋua.
S.TRANSL: 他抱著頭,心想:「哎唷要怎麼辦?頭要被噣了.」

TRANSL.notes: He holds his head (and think) "What should I do? My head will be pecked!"

S.TRANSL: He holds his head "What should I do? My head will be pecked!"

S.FORM: sadu saia tu aiza maupa tu tuundaingaza.
S.PHON: sadu saia tu aiða maupa tu tuundaiŋaða.
S.FORM: sadu saia tu aiza maupa tu tuundaingaza.
S.PHON: sadu saia tu aiða maupa tu tuundaiŋaða.
S.TRANSL: 他好像看到一顆大岩石.
He seems to see a huge rock.

S.FORM: tungnadaza saia tunkaudukaudu sia kudadaza nii tu haiap tu saia hai ka ngabuldaingaz.
S.PHON: tuŋnadaða saia tunkaudukaudu ɕia kudadaða nii tu x~χaiap tu saia x~χai ka ŋabul~ɬdaiŋað.
S.FORM: tungnadaza saia tunkaudukaudu sia kudadaza nii tu haiap tu saia hai ka ngabuldaingaz.
S.PHON: tuŋnadaða saia tunkaudukaudu ɕia kudadaða nii tu x~χaiap tu saia x~χai ka ŋabul~ɬdaiŋað.
S.TRANSL: 他爬上去躲藏,不知道那原來是隻巨大的鹿.
He climbs up and hides there, without knowing it is a huge deer.

S.FORM: ung at tunnadaza saia tu ngabul tu bungu at taldidikus sia itu ngabul tu vaha.
S.PHON: uŋ at tunnadaða saia tu ŋabul~ɬ tu buŋu at tal~ɬdidikus ɕia itu ŋabul~ɬ tu vax~χa.
S.FORM: ung at tunnadaza saia tu ngabul tu bungu at taldidikus sia itu ngabul tu vaha.
S.PHON: uŋ at tunnadaða saia tu ŋabul~ɬ tu buŋu at tal~ɬdidikus ɕia itu ŋabul~ɬ tu vax~χa.
S.TRANSL: 接著,他就爬上鹿的頭,緊緊握住鹿角.
Then he gets onto the deer's head, seizing antlers tightly.

S.FORM: malala'la saia tu isa kamu sima kamu haiap mas sisiuh ung at sasu tu isaicia asu hai tunghabin 'amin at.
S.PHON: mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa saia tu isa kamu ɕima kamu x~χaiap mas ɕiɕiux~χ uŋ at sasu tu isaiʨia asu x~χai tuŋx~χabin ʔamin at.
S.FORM: malala'la saia tu isa kamu sima kamu haiap mas sisiuh ung at sasu tu isaicia asu hai tunghabin 'amin at.
S.PHON: mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa saia tu isa kamu ɕima kamu x~χaiap mas ɕiɕiux~χ uŋ at sasu tu isaiʨia asu x~χai tuŋx~χabin ʔamin at.
S.TRANSL: 他大叫著:「你們是誰?你們在哪裡?看過那個青蛙嗎?」接著,他的狗同時也躲起來.
He yells "Who are you? Where are you? Do you know the frog?" Then, at the same time his dog hides too.

S.FORM: kikilim saia malala'la at.
S.PHON: kikil~ɬim saia mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa at.
S.FORM: kikilim saia malala'la at.
S.PHON: kikil~ɬim saia mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa at.
S.TRANSL: 他邊叫邊找 .

TRANSL.notes: He yells and looks for (the frog).

S.TRANSL: He yells and looks for .

S.FORM: idadaza saia sia nii saia haiap tu maza tun dazaan saicia hai kat amus ka ngabuldaingaz.
S.PHON: idadaða saia ɕia nii saia x~χaiap tu maða tun daðaan saiʨia x~χai kat amus ka ŋabul~ɬdaiŋað.
S.FORM: idadaza saia sia nii saia haiap tu maza tun dazaan saicia hai kat amus ka ngabuldaingaz.
S.PHON: idadaða saia ɕia nii saia x~χaiap tu maða tun daðaan saiʨia x~χai kat amus ka ŋabul~ɬdaiŋað.
S.TRANSL: 他在上面,他不知道他搭的,原來是那麼大的鹿.
He is on there, and he does not know what he rides on is a huge deer.

S.FORM: ka cindangkaz a maza sia ka 'anvakangun a uvaaza 'anvahaun sia 'itu ngabul tu vahacia.
S.PHON: ka ʨindaŋkað a maða ɕia ka ʔanvakaŋun a uvaaða ʔanvax~χaun ɕia ʔitu ŋabul~ɬ tu vax~χaʨia.
S.FORM: ka cindangkaz a maza sia ka 'anvakangun a uvaaza 'anvahaun sia 'itu ngabul tu vahacia.
S.PHON: ka ʨindaŋkað a maða ɕia ka ʔanvakaŋun a uvaaða ʔanvax~χaun ɕia ʔitu ŋabul~ɬ tu vax~χaʨia.
S.TRANSL: 鹿突然站起來,用肩扛著孩子,扛在角上.
All of a sudden the deer stands up, carrying the kid across its shoulders and antlers.

S.FORM: cisdadaan a ngabula.
S.PHON: ʨisdadaan a ŋabul~ɬa.
S.FORM: cisdadaan a ngabula.
S.PHON: ʨisdadaan a ŋabul~ɬa.
S.TRANSL: 那個鹿一直跑.
That deer keep running.

S.FORM: halhalun a uvaaza sia vahlasdaingas tu 'ung'ung.
S.PHON: x~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬun a uvaaða ɕia vax~χl~ɬasdaiŋas tu ʔuŋʔuŋ.
S.FORM: halhalun a uvaaza sia vahlasdaingas tu 'ung'ung.
S.PHON: x~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬun a uvaaða ɕia vax~χl~ɬasdaiŋas tu ʔuŋʔuŋ.
S.TRANSL: 孩子被丟在深谷大河的流裡面.
The kid falls into a big river in the valley.

S.FORM: aiu muhalhal a uvaaza lanangadah sia 'ung'ung tu vahlas at.
S.PHON: aiu mux~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬ a uvaaða l~ɬanaŋadax~χ ɕia ʔuŋʔuŋ tu vax~χl~ɬas at.
S.FORM: aiu muhalhal a uvaaza lanangadah sia 'ung'ung tu vahlas at.
S.PHON: aiu mux~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬ a uvaaða l~ɬanaŋadax~χ ɕia ʔuŋʔuŋ tu vax~χl~ɬas at.
S.TRANSL: 那個孩子就這樣掉進深谷的河流裡.
That kid falls into river of the valley.

S.FORM: muhalhal 'amin a asua.
S.PHON: mux~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬ ʔamin a asua.
S.FORM: muhalhal 'amin a asua.
S.PHON: mux~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬ ʔamin a asua.
S.TRANSL: 狗也掉下去了.
The dog also falls.

S.FORM: lanangadah naia sia vahlas tu 'ung'ungdaingas.
S.PHON: l~ɬanaŋadax~χ naia ɕia vax~χl~ɬas tu ʔuŋʔuŋdaiŋas.
S.FORM: lanangadah naia sia vahlas tu 'ung'ungdaingas.
S.PHON: l~ɬanaŋadax~χ naia ɕia vax~χl~ɬas tu ʔuŋʔuŋdaiŋas.
S.TRANSL: 他們掉到山谷的河流裡.
They fall into the river of the valley.

S.FORM: sadu maza 'uvaaza lanangadah naia sia danumcia at.
S.PHON: sadu maða ʔuvaaða l~ɬanaŋadax~χ naia ɕia danumʨia at.
S.FORM: sadu maza 'uvaaza lanangadah naia sia danumcia at.
S.PHON: sadu maða ʔuvaaða l~ɬanaŋadax~χ naia ɕia danumʨia at.
S.TRANSL: 哎唷,那個小孩看到他們掉到水裡.
Oops! That kid sees they drops into the water.

S.FORM: uvaaza hai miliskin tu namikua at asu a munghanu hai.
S.PHON: uvaaða x~χai mil~ɬiskin tu namikua at asu a muŋx~χanu x~χai.
S.FORM: uvaaza hai miliskin tu namikua at asu a munghanu hai.
S.PHON: uvaaða x~χai mil~ɬiskin tu namikua at asu a muŋx~χanu x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 小孩心想要是狗被沖走的話怎麼辦.
The kid thinks about what he should do if the dog is flushed away.

S.FORM: mahansiap saia miliskin tu 'anvahaun saicia maza asua 'ansainun saicia sia vau.
S.PHON: max~χanɕiap saia mil~ɬiskin tu ʔanvax~χaun saiʨia maða asua ʔansainun saiʨia ɕia vau.
S.FORM: mahansiap saia miliskin tu 'anvahaun saicia maza asua 'ansainun saicia sia vau.
S.PHON: max~χanɕiap saia mil~ɬiskin tu ʔanvax~χaun saiʨia maða asua ʔansainun saiʨia ɕia vau.
S.TRANSL: 他靈機一動,思考著把狗扛在他的肩膀.
A bright idea suddenly occurs to him, he thinks about carrying the dog across his shoulders.

S.FORM: at makilavi naias ning'av ah vahlascia mutaul.
S.PHON: at makil~ɬavi naias niŋʔav ax~χ vax~χl~ɬasʨia mutaul~ɬ.
S.FORM: at makilavi naias ning'av ah vahlascia mutaul.
S.PHON: at makil~ɬavi naias niŋʔav ax~χ vax~χl~ɬasʨia mutaul~ɬ.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們順流而下.
Then they go along with the river flow.

S.FORM: sadu saia tu aiza maza tuhlukisdaingaz.
S.PHON: sadu saia tu aiða maða tux~χl~ɬukisdaiŋað.
S.FORM: sadu saia tu aiza maza tuhlukisdaingaz.
S.PHON: sadu saia tu aiða maða tux~χl~ɬukisdaiŋað.
S.TRANSL: 他們看到有個很大的樹頭.
They see a big trunk existing.

S.FORM: miliskin saia tu na tungnadii kata tungkadang natungkadang sia aiza tuhlukisdaingaza.
S.PHON: mil~ɬiskin saia tu na tuŋnadii kata tuŋkadaŋ natuŋkadaŋ ɕia aiða tux~χl~ɬukisdaiŋaða.
S.FORM: miliskin saia tu na tungnadii kata tungkadang natungkadang sia aiza tuhlukisdaingaza.
S.PHON: mil~ɬiskin saia tu na tuŋnadii kata tuŋkadaŋ natuŋkadaŋ ɕia aiða tux~χl~ɬukisdaiŋaða.
S.TRANSL: 他想:「我們要到那邊去,用那個樹幹躲起來.」
He thinks "We should get over there, and hide behind the trunk."

S.FORM: at tungnadadaza naia hai ai tupausaicia maza asu tu h s pataliva.
S.PHON: at tuŋnadadaða naia x~χai ai tupausaiʨia maða asu tu x~χ s patal~ɬiva.
S.FORM: at tungnadadaza naia hai ai tupausaicia maza asu tu h s pataliva.
S.PHON: at tuŋnadadaða naia x~χai ai tupausaiʨia maða asu tu x~χ s patal~ɬiva.
S.TRANSL: 他對那隻狗說:「噓,別出聲.」
Then he tells the dog "Shh! Keep quiet!"

S.FORM: at maupa tu utazaan naia mas aiza sisiuha tu'i'ia sia tanngadah tuhlukiscia.
S.PHON: at maupa tu utaðaan naia mas aiða ɕiɕiux~χa tuʔiʔia ɕia tanŋadax~χ tux~χl~ɬukisʨia.
S.FORM: at maupa tu utazaan naia mas aiza sisiuha tu'i'ia sia tanngadah tuhlukiscia.
S.PHON: at maupa tu utaðaan naia mas aiða ɕiɕiux~χa tuʔiʔia ɕia tanŋadax~χ tux~χl~ɬukisʨia.
S.TRANSL: 他們好像聽到有青蛙在木頭下面叫.
They seem to hear frogs calling under the wood.

S.FORM: ung at tuza tu kudadaza naia sadu kudadaza amin a asua sia tuhlukis dadaza at.
S.PHON: uŋ at tuða tu kudadaða naia sadu kudadaða amin a asua ɕia tux~χl~ɬukis dadaða at.
S.FORM: ung at tuza tu kudadaza naia sadu kudadaza amin a asua sia tuhlukis dadaza at.
S.PHON: uŋ at tuða tu kudadaða naia sadu kudadaða amin a asua ɕia tux~χl~ɬukis dadaða at.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們上去看.那隻狗也到木頭上去.
Then they go up and see. The dog also gets onto the wood.

S.FORM: minadaza naia uvaaz sadu hai.
S.PHON: minadaða naia uvaað sadu x~χai.
S.FORM: minadaza naia uvaaz sadu hai.
S.PHON: minadaða naia uvaað sadu x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 他們從上往下看.
They look down from the top.

S.FORM: aii tuza tu usaduan naia aiza tauk dusa itu sisiuhcia sisiuh tu tama mas cina.
S.PHON: aii tuða tu usaduan naia aiða tauk dusa itu ɕiɕiux~χʨia ɕiɕiux~χ tu tama mas ʨina.
S.FORM: aii tuza tu usaduan naia aiza tauk dusa itu sisiuhcia sisiuh tu tama mas cina.
S.PHON: aii tuða tu usaduan naia aiða tauk dusa itu ɕiɕiux~χʨia ɕiɕiux~χ tu tama mas ʨina.
S.TRANSL: 哇,他們真的看到,有一對青蛙,那個青蛙的爸爸和媽媽.
Aw! They can truly see a couple of frogs, frog father and frog mother.

S.FORM: tu'i'ia naia masling kahuzas tu'i'ia.
S.PHON: tuʔiʔia naia masl~ɬiŋ kax~χuðas tuʔiʔia.
S.FORM: tu'i'ia naia masling kahuzas tu'i'ia.
S.PHON: tuʔiʔia naia masl~ɬiŋ kax~χuðas tuʔiʔia.
S.TRANSL: 他們一直叫,悅耳的唱歌.
They keep calling and singing wonderfully.

S.FORM: at minadaza naia sia tuhlukiscia sadu uvaaza mas asucia sadu mas adii tamacinaa tu aiza sisiuh aiu supahdau isaicia tas'an.
S.PHON: at minadaða naia ɕia tux~χl~ɬukisʨia sadu uvaaða mas asuʨia sadu mas adii tamaʨinaa tu aiða ɕiɕiux~χ aiu supax~χdau isaiʨia tasʔan.
S.FORM: at minadaza naia sia tuhlukiscia sadu uvaaza mas asucia sadu mas adii tamacinaa tu aiza sisiuh aiu supahdau isaicia tas'an.
S.PHON: at minadaða naia ɕia tux~χl~ɬukisʨia sadu uvaaða mas asuʨia sadu mas adii tamaʨinaa tu aiða ɕiɕiux~χ aiu supax~χdau isaiʨia tasʔan.

TRANSL.notes: 他們從樹頭上看著,小孩子和狗看(青蛙)爸爸媽媽那邊,發現原來有那麼多兄弟姊妹啊!

S.TRANSL: 他們從樹頭上看著,小孩子和狗看 爸爸媽媽那邊,發現原來有那麼多兄弟姊妹啊!
They look from the wood. The kid and the dog find out there are tons of the frog's siblings around the frog parents.

S.FORM: at sadu naia hai avadii saicia maza dinamu saicia sisiuha.
S.PHON: at sadu naia x~χai avadii saiʨia maða dinamu saiʨia ɕiɕiux~χa.
S.FORM: at sadu naia hai avadii saicia maza dinamu saicia sisiuha.
S.PHON: at sadu naia x~χai avadii saiʨia maða dinamu saiʨia ɕiɕiux~χa.
S.TRANSL: 他們一直看著,他抓的那隻小青蛙原來在那邊.
They keep looking around, finding out the frog they caught is just there!

S.FORM: isaicia hangsia saia tu uvaaz.
S.PHON: isaiʨia x~χaŋɕia saia tu uvaað.
S.FORM: isaicia hangsia saia tu uvaaz.
S.PHON: isaiʨia x~χaŋɕia saia tu uvaað.
S.TRANSL: 原來是他的孩子.
It turns out to be its son.

S.FORM: at supah a isaicia tas'an aluskunan.
S.PHON: at supax~χ a isaiʨia tasʔan al~ɬuskunan.
S.FORM: at supah a isaicia tas'an aluskunan.
S.PHON: at supax~χ a isaiʨia tasʔan al~ɬuskunan.
S.TRANSL: 他住一起的兄弟姊妹好多!
He has so many siblings living together.

S.FORM: manaskal isaincia kahuhuzas tu'i'ia maza sia sisiuha.
S.PHON: manaskal~ɬ isainʨia kax~χux~χuðas tuʔiʔia maða ɕia ɕiɕiux~χa.
S.FORM: manaskal isaincia kahuhuzas tu'i'ia maza sia sisiuha.
S.PHON: manaskal~ɬ isainʨia kax~χux~χuðas tuʔiʔia maða ɕia ɕiɕiux~χa.
S.TRANSL: 那些青蛙在那邊很高興地一直呱呱地唱著歌.
Those frogs are singing happily there.

S.FORM: at ta'aza tunahtung naia tu'ia hai kudii maza sia uvaaza madamu mas isaicia tu sinaipuk tu maicisbai tu sisiuhcia.
S.PHON: at taʔaða tunax~χtuŋ naia tuʔia x~χai kudii maða ɕia uvaaða madamu mas isaiʨia tu ɕinaipuk tu maiʨisbai tu ɕiɕiux~χʨia.
S.FORM: at ta'aza tunahtung naia tu'ia hai kudii maza sia uvaaza madamu mas isaicia tu sinaipuk tu maicisbai tu sisiuhcia.
S.PHON: at taʔaða tunax~χtuŋ naia tuʔia x~χai kudii maða ɕia uvaaða madamu mas isaiʨia tu ɕinaipuk tu maiʨisbai tu ɕiɕiux~χʨia.
S.TRANSL: 他們聽到他們唱完後,那個孩子就去抓那隻他曾經養過但跑掉的青蛙.
After hearing them finish singing, the kid catches the runaway frog he kept before.

S.FORM: at tupa saia tu ai tupaun saicia itu sisiuha tamacina amin tas'an tu kaa tu makuang is'aang laangaci na izaunku isuu sisiuh uvaaza napisialunku sian saipuk mapisia naak tu lumah.
S.PHON: at tupa saia tu ai tupaun saiʨia itu ɕiɕiux~χa tamaʨina amin tasʔan tu kaa tu makuaŋ isʔaaŋ l~ɬaaŋaʨi na iðaunku isuu ɕiɕiux~χ uvaaða napiɕial~ɬunku ɕian saipuk mapiɕia naak tu l~ɬumax~χ.
S.FORM: at tupa saia tu ai tupaun saicia itu sisiuha tamacina amin tas'an tu kaa tu makuang is'aang laangaci na izaunku isuu sisiuh uvaaza napisialunku sian saipuk mapisia naak tu lumah.
S.PHON: at tupa saia tu ai tupaun saiʨia itu ɕiɕiux~χa tamaʨina amin tasʔan tu kaa tu makuaŋ isʔaaŋ l~ɬaaŋaʨi na iðaunku isuu ɕiɕiux~χ uvaaða napiɕial~ɬunku ɕian saipuk mapiɕia naak tu l~ɬumax~χ.
S.TRANSL: 然後,他跟青蛙家族說:「別難過,總之我要把小青蛙帶走,把他好好的養在我家.」
Then, he says to the frog family "Don't be sad! I am going to take your child and raise it well in my home anyway."

W.TRANSL: 非實現=使役-在-好-受焦=1SG.屬格

S.FORM: naiska'uniku masial tu dadangian.
S.PHON: naiskaʔuniku maɕial~ɬ tu dadaŋian.
S.FORM: naiska'uniku masial tu dadangian.
S.PHON: naiskaʔuniku maɕial~ɬ tu dadaŋian.
S.TRANSL: 我會幫他打造個美好的家.
I will make it a good living place.

S.FORM: at maupacia naia pacinpalavaaz tupa tu ung mihumisang.
S.PHON: at maupaʨia naia paʨinpal~ɬavaað tupa tu uŋ mix~χumisaŋ.
S.FORM: at maupacia naia pacinpalavaaz tupa tu ung mihumisang.
S.PHON: at maupaʨia naia paʨinpal~ɬavaað tupa tu uŋ mix~χumisaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們就這樣彼此祝福,互相分開.
Then they leave, they wish one another all good.

S.FORM: kaupacia.
S.PHON: kaupaʨia.
S.FORM: kaupacia.
S.PHON: kaupaʨia.
S.TRANSL: 就到這裡.
That's it!
